problem id: 3ace787f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  11101100 -> 10100111
  11011000 -> 00001111
  11010101 -> 00100110
  00101111 -> 01001101
  01011001 -> 01100011
  11110101 -> 00101111
  11100101 -> 10101111
  01100101 -> 10001111

query: 01111011
predicted answer: 11111011
